reasonCodes.meaning: The draft resume grant family was superseded because submit promotion committed.
The immutable submit boundary completed and the draft lineage may no longer reopen as mutable work.
Same-lineage request truth exists and may be used for redirect when lawful proof is still presented.
The shared post-promotion route-entry and recovery contract is implemented and versioned.
The presented stale draft proof does not lawfully widen into request-view scope.
No lawful promoted request redirect is available, so stale draft entry must fall into bounded recovery.
The presented draft resume token is not syntactically valid.
The presented draft resume token no longer resolves to a grant.
The grant exists but its scope envelope is no longer available for lawful resume validation.
The presented grant still proves same-lineage continuity, but it is no longer valid for mutable draft use.
